label: Matt 3:15
verseText: And Jesus answering said unto him, Suffer it to be so now: for thus it becometh us to fulfil all righteousness. Then he suffered him.
jesusText: Suffer it to be so now: for thus it becometh us to fulfil all righteousness.

label: Matt 4:4
verseText: But he answered and said, It is written, Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth of God.
jesusText: It is written, Man shall not live by bread alone, but by every word that proceedeth out of the mouth of God.

label: Matt 4:7
verseText: Jesus said unto him, It is written again, Thou shalt not tempt the Lord thy God.
jesusText: It is written again, Thou shalt not tempt the Lord thy God.

label: Matt 4:10
verseText: Then saith Jesus unto him, Get thee hence, Satan: for it is written, Thou shalt worship the Lord thy God, and him only shalt thou serve.
jesusText: Get thee hence, Satan: for it is written, Thou shalt worship the Lord thy God, and him only shalt thou serve.

label: Matt 8:3–4
verseText: And Jesus put forth his hand, and touched him, saying, I will; be thou clean. And immediately his leprosy was cleansed.
And Jesus saith unto him, See thou tell no man; but go thy way, shew thyself to the priest, and offer the gift that Moses commanded, for a testimony unto them.
jesusText: I will; be thou clean.
See thou tell no man; but go thy way, shew thyself to the priest, and offer the gift that Moses commanded, for a testimony unto them.

label: Matt 8:7
verseText: And Jesus saith unto him, I will come and heal him.
jesusText: I will come and heal him.

label: Matt 8:10
verseText: When Jesus heard it, he marvelled, and said to them that followed, Verily I say unto you, I have not found so great faith, no, not in Israel.
jesusText: Verily I say unto you, I have not found so great faith, no, not in Israel.

label: Matt 8:13
verseText: And Jesus said unto the centurion, Go thy way; and as thou hast believed, so be it done unto thee. And his servant was healed in the selfsame hour.
jesusText: Go thy way; and as thou hast believed, so be it done unto thee.

label: Matt 8:32
verseText: And he said unto them, Go. And when they were come out, they went into the herd of swine: and, behold, the whole herd of swine ran violently down a steep place into the sea, and perished in the waters.
jesusText: Go.

label: Matt 9:9
verseText: ¶ And as Jesus passed forth from thence, he saw a man, named Matthew, sitting at the receipt of custom: and he saith unto him, Follow me. And he arose, and followed him.
jesusText: Follow me.

label: Matt 9:24
verseText: He said unto them, Give place: for the maid is not dead, but sleepeth. And they laughed him to scorn.
jesusText: Give place: for the maid is not dead, but sleepeth.

label: Matt 9:28
verseText: And when he was come into the house, the blind men came to him: and Jesus saith unto them, Believe ye that I am able to do this? They said unto him, Yea, Lord.
jesusText: Believe ye that I am able to do this?

label: Matt 9:30
verseText: And their eyes were opened; and Jesus straitly charged them, saying, See that no man know it.
jesusText: See that no man know it.

label: Matt 11:14
verseText: And if ye will receive it, this is Elias, which was for to come.
jesusText: And if ye will receive it, this is Elias, which was for to come.

label: Matt 11:16–19
verseText: ¶ But whereunto shall I liken this generation? It is like unto children sitting in the markets, and calling unto their fellows,
And saying, We have piped unto you, and ye have not danced; we have mourned unto you, and ye have not lamented.
For John came neither eating nor drinking, and they say, He hath a devil.
The Son of man came eating and drinking, and they say, Behold a man gluttonous, and a winebibber, a friend of publicans and sinners. But wisdom is justified of her children.
jesusText: ¶ But whereunto shall I liken this generation? It is like unto children sitting in the markets, and calling unto their fellows,
And saying, We have piped unto you, and ye have not danced; we have mourned unto you, and ye have not lamented.
For John came neither eating nor drinking, and they say, He hath a devil.
The Son of man came eating and drinking, and they say, Behold a man gluttonous, and a winebibber, a friend of publicans and sinners. But wisdom is justified of her children.

label: Matt 11:21
verseText: Woe unto thee, Chorazin! woe unto thee, Bethsaida! for if the mighty works, which were done in you, had been done in Tyre and Sidon, they would have repented long ago in sackcloth and ashes.
jesusText: Woe unto thee, Chorazin! woe unto thee, Bethsaida! for if the mighty works, which were done in you, had been done in Tyre and Sidon, they would have repented long ago in sackcloth and ashes.

label: Matt 11:25–26
verseText: ¶ At that time Jesus answered and said, I thank thee, O Father, Lord of heaven and earth, because thou hast hid these things from the wise and prudent, and hast revealed them unto babes.
Even so, Father: for so it seemed good in thy sight.
jesusText: I thank thee, O Father, Lord of heaven and earth, because thou hast hid these things from the wise and prudent, and hast revealed them unto babes.
Even so, Father: for so it seemed good in thy sight.

label: Matt 12:3–6
verseText: But he said unto them, Have ye not read what David did, when he was an hungred, and they that were with him;
How he entered into the house of God, and did eat the shewbread, which was not lawful for him to eat, neither for them which were with him, but only for the priests?
Or have ye not read in the law, how that on the sabbath days the priests in the temple profane the sabbath, and are blameless?
But I say unto you, That in this place is one greater than the temple.
jesusText: Have ye not read what David did, when he was an hungred, and they that were with him;
How he entered into the house of God, and did eat the shewbread, which was not lawful for him to eat, neither for them which were with him, but only for the priests?
Or have ye not read in the law, how that on the sabbath days the priests in the temple profane the sabbath, and are blameless?
But I say unto you, That in this place is one greater than the temple.

label: Matt 12:13
verseText: Then saith he to the man, Stretch forth thine hand. And he stretched it forth; and it was restored whole, like as the other.
jesusText: Stretch forth thine hand.

label: Matt 12:33–35
verseText: Either make the tree good, and his fruit good; or else make the tree corrupt, and his fruit corrupt: for the tree is known by his fruit.
O generation of vipers, how can ye, being evil, speak good things? for out of the abundance of the heart the mouth speaketh.
A good man out of the good treasure of the heart bringeth forth good things: and an evil man out of the evil treasure bringeth forth evil things.
jesusText: Either make the tree good, and his fruit good; or else make the tree corrupt, and his fruit corrupt: for the tree is known by his fruit.
O generation of vipers, how can ye, being evil, speak good things? for out of the abundance of the heart the mouth speaketh.
A good man out of the good treasure of the heart bringeth forth good things: and an evil man out of the evil treasure bringeth forth evil things.

label: Matt 12:39
verseText: But he answered and said unto them, An evil and adulterous generation seeketh after a sign; and there shall no sign be given to it, but the sign of the prophet Jonas:
jesusText: An evil and adulterous generation seeketh after a sign; and there shall no sign be given to it, but the sign of the prophet Jonas:

label: Matt 12:41–42
verseText: The men of Nineveh shall rise in judgment with this generation, and shall condemn it: because they repented at the preaching of Jonas; and, behold, a greater than Jonas is here.

The queen of the south shall rise up in the judgment with this generation, and shall condemn it: for she came from the uttermost parts of the earth to hear the wisdom of Solomon; and, behold, a greater than Solomon is here.
jesusText: The men of Nineveh shall rise in judgment with this generation, and shall condemn it: because they repented at the preaching of Jonas; and, behold, a greater than Jonas is here.

The queen of the south shall rise up in the judgment with this generation, and shall condemn it: for she came from the uttermost parts of the earth to hear the wisdom of Solomon; and, behold, a greater than Solomon is here.

label: Matt 12:48–49
verseText: But he answered and said unto him that told him, Who is my mother? and who are my brethren?
And he stretched forth his hand toward his disciples, and said, Behold my mother and my brethren!
jesusText: Who is my mother? and who are my brethren?
Behold my mother and my brethren!

label: Matt 13:14–15
verseText: And in them is fulfilled the prophecy of Esaias, which saith, By hearing ye shall hear, and shall not understand; and seeing ye shall see, and shall not perceive:

For this people’s heart is waxed gross, and their ears are dull of hearing, and their eyes they have closed; lest at any time they should see with their eyes, and hear with their ears, and should understand with their heart, and should be converted, and I should heal them.
jesusText: And in them is fulfilled the prophecy of Esaias, which saith, By hearing ye shall hear, and shall not understand; and seeing ye shall see, and shall not perceive:

For this people’s heart is waxed gross, and their ears are dull of hearing, and their eyes they have closed; lest at any time they should see with their eyes, and hear with their ears, and should understand with their heart, and should be converted, and I should heal them.

label: Matt 13:51–52
verseText: Jesus saith unto them, Have ye understood all these things? They say unto him, Yea, Lord.
Then said he unto them, Therefore every scribe which is instructed unto the kingdom of heaven is like unto a man that is an householder, which bringeth forth out of his treasure things new and old.
jesusText: Have ye understood all these things?
Therefore every scribe which is instructed unto the kingdom of heaven is like unto a man that is an householder, which bringeth forth out of his treasure things new and old.

label: Matt 13:57
verseText: And they were offended in him. But Jesus said unto them, A prophet is not without honour, save in his own country, and in his own house.
jesusText: A prophet is not without honour, save in his own country, and in his own house.

label: Matt 14:16
verseText: But Jesus said unto them, They need not depart; give ye them to eat.
jesusText: They need not depart; give ye them to eat.

label: Matt 14:18
verseText: He said, Bring them hither to me.
jesusText: Bring them hither to me.

label: Matt 14:27
verseText: But straightway Jesus spake unto them, saying, Be of good cheer; it is I; be not afraid.
jesusText: Be of good cheer; it is I; be not afraid.

label: Matt 14:29
verseText: And he said, Come. And when Peter was come down out of the ship, he walked on the water, to go to Jesus.
jesusText: Come.

label: Matt 15:10
verseText: ¶ And he called the multitude, and said unto them, Hear, and understand:
jesusText: Hear, and understand:

label: Matt 15:13
verseText: But he answered and said, Every plant, which my heavenly Father hath not planted, shall be rooted up.
jesusText: Every plant, which my heavenly Father hath not planted, shall be rooted up.

label: Matt 15:16–17
verseText: And Jesus said, Are ye also yet without understanding?
Do not ye yet understand, that whatsoever entereth in at the mouth goeth into the belly, and is cast out into the draught?
jesusText: Are ye also yet without understanding?
Do not ye yet understand, that whatsoever entereth in at the mouth goeth into the belly, and is cast out into the draught?

label: Matt 15:20
verseText: These are the things which defile a man: but to eat with unwashen hands defileth not a man.
jesusText: These are the things which defile a man: but to eat with unwashen hands defileth not a man.

label: Matt 15:24
verseText: But he answered and said, I am not sent but unto the lost sheep of the house of Israel.
jesusText: I am not sent but unto the lost sheep of the house of Israel.

label: Matt 15:26
verseText: But he answered and said, It is not meet to take the children’s bread, and to cast it to dogs.
jesusText: It is not meet to take the children’s bread, and to cast it to dogs.

label: Matt 15:28
verseText: Then Jesus answered and said unto her, O woman, great is thy faith: be it unto thee even as thou wilt. And her daughter was made whole from that very hour.
jesusText: O woman, great is thy faith: be it unto thee even as thou wilt.

label: Matt 15:32
verseText: ¶ Then Jesus called his disciples unto him, and said, I have compassion on the multitude, because they continue with me now three days, and have nothing to eat: and I will not send them away fasting, lest they faint in the way.
jesusText: I have compassion on the multitude, because they continue with me now three days, and have nothing to eat: and I will not send them away fasting, lest they faint in the way.

label: Matt 15:34
verseText: And Jesus saith unto them, How many loaves have ye? And they said, Seven, and a few little fishes.
jesusText: How many loaves have ye?

label: Matt 16:2
verseText: He answered and said unto them, When it is evening, ye say, It will be fair weather: for the sky is red.
jesusText: When it is evening, ye say, It will be fair weather: for the sky is red.

label: Matt 16:4
verseText: A wicked and adulterous generation seeketh after a sign; and there shall no sign be given unto it, but the sign of the prophet Jonas. And he left them, and departed.
jesusText: A wicked and adulterous generation seeketh after a sign; and there shall no sign be given unto it, but the sign of the prophet Jonas.

label: Matt 16:8–10
verseText: Which when Jesus perceived, he said unto them, O ye of little faith, why reason ye among yourselves, because ye have brought no bread?
Do ye not yet understand, neither remember the five loaves of the five thousand, and how many baskets ye took up?
Neither the seven loaves of the four thousand, and how many baskets ye took up?
jesusText: O ye of little faith, why reason ye among yourselves, because ye have brought no bread?
Do ye not yet understand, neither remember the five loaves of the five thousand, and how many baskets ye took up?
Neither the seven loaves of the four thousand, and how many baskets ye took up?

label: Matt 16:13
verseText: ¶ When Jesus came into the coasts of Caesarea Philippi, he asked his disciples, saying, Whom do men say that I the Son of man am?
jesusText: Whom do men say that I the Son of man am?

label: Matt 16:15
verseText: He saith unto them, But whom say ye that I am?
jesusText: But whom say ye that I am?

label: Matt 16:17
verseText: And Jesus answered and said unto him, Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona: for flesh and blood hath not revealed it unto thee, but my Father which is in heaven.
jesusText: Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona: for flesh and blood hath not revealed it unto thee, but my Father which is in heaven.

label: Matt 16:23
verseText: But he turned, and said unto Peter, Get thee behind me, Satan: thou art an offence unto me: for thou savourest not the things that be of God, but those that be of men.
jesusText: Get thee behind me, Satan: thou art an offence unto me: for thou savourest not the things that be of God, but those that be of men.

label: Matt 17:7
verseText: And Jesus came and touched them, and said, Arise, and be not afraid.
jesusText: Arise, and be not afraid.

label: Matt 17:9
verseText: And as they came down from the mountain, Jesus charged them, saying, Tell the vision to no man, until the Son of man be risen again from the dead.
jesusText: Tell the vision to no man, until the Son of man be risen again from the dead.

label: Matt 17:11–12
verseText: And Jesus answered and said unto them, Elias truly shall first come, and restore all things.
But I say unto you, That Elias is come already, and they knew him not, but have done unto him whatsoever they listed. Likewise shall also the Son of man suffer of them.
jesusText: Elias truly shall first come, and restore all things.
But I say unto you, That Elias is come already, and they knew him not, but have done unto him whatsoever they listed. Likewise shall also the Son of man suffer of them.

label: Matt 17:17
verseText: Then Jesus answered and said, O faithless and perverse generation, how long shall I be with you? how long shall I suffer you? bring him hither to me.
jesusText: O faithless and perverse generation, how long shall I be with you? how long shall I suffer you? bring him hither to me.

label: Matt 17:25–27
verseText: He saith, Yes. And when he was come into the house, Jesus prevented him, saying, What thinkest thou, Simon? of whom do the kings of the earth take custom or tribute? of their own children, or of strangers?
Peter saith unto him, Of strangers. Jesus saith unto him, Then are the children free.

Notwithstanding, lest we should offend them, go thou to the sea, and cast an hook, and take up the fish that first cometh up; and when thou hast opened his mouth, thou shalt find a piece of money: that take, and give unto them for me and thee.
jesusText: What thinkest thou, Simon? of whom do the kings of the earth take custom or tribute? of their own children, or of strangers?
Then are the children free.

Notwithstanding, lest we should offend them, go thou to the sea, and cast an hook, and take up the fish that first cometh up; and when thou hast opened his mouth, thou shalt find a piece of money: that take, and give unto them for me and thee.

label: Matt 18:11
verseText: For the Son of man is come to save that which was lost.
jesusText: For the Son of man is come to save that which was lost.

label: Matt 19:28
verseText: And Jesus said unto them, Verily I say unto you, That ye which have followed me, in the regeneration when the Son of man shall sit in the throne of his glory, ye also shall sit upon twelve thrones, judging the twelve tribes of Israel.
jesusText: Verily I say unto you, That ye which have followed me, in the regeneration when the Son of man shall sit in the throne of his glory, ye also shall sit upon twelve thrones, judging the twelve tribes of Israel.

label: Matt 19:30
verseText: But many that are first shall be last; and the last shall be first.
jesusText: But many that are first shall be last; and the last shall be first.

label: Matt 20:18–19
verseText: Behold, we go up to Jerusalem; and the Son of man shall be betrayed unto the chief priests and unto the scribes, and they shall condemn him to death,
And shall deliver him to the Gentiles to mock, and to scourge, and to crucify him: and the third day he shall rise again.
jesusText: Behold, we go up to Jerusalem; and the Son of man shall be betrayed unto the chief priests and unto the scribes, and they shall condemn him to death,
And shall deliver him to the Gentiles to mock, and to scourge, and to crucify him: and the third day he shall rise again.

label: Matt 20:32
verseText: And Jesus stood still, and called them, and said, What will ye that I shall do unto you?
jesusText: What will ye that I shall do unto you?

label: Matt 21:2–3
verseText: Saying unto them, Go into the village over against you, and straightway ye shall find an ass tied, and a colt with her: loose them, and bring them unto me.
And if any man say ought unto you, ye shall say, The Lord hath need of them; and straightway he will send them.
jesusText: Go into the village over against you, and straightway ye shall find an ass tied, and a colt with her: loose them, and bring them unto me.
And if any man say ought unto you, ye shall say, The Lord hath need of them; and straightway he will send them.

label: Matt 21:13
verseText: And said unto them, It is written, My house shall be called the house of prayer; but ye have made it a den of thieves.
jesusText: It is written, My house shall be called the house of prayer; but ye have made it a den of thieves.

label: Matt 21:16
verseText: And said unto him, Hearest thou what these say? And Jesus saith unto them, Yea; have ye never read, Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings thou hast perfected praise?
jesusText: Yea; have ye never read, Out of the mouth of babes and sucklings thou hast perfected praise?

label: Matt 21:19
verseText: And when he saw a fig tree in the way, he came to it, and found nothing thereon, but leaves only, and said unto it, Let no fruit grow on thee henceforward for ever. And presently the fig tree withered away.
jesusText: Let no fruit grow on thee henceforward for ever.

label: Matt 21:24–25
verseText: And Jesus answered and said unto them, I also will ask you one thing, which if ye tell me, I in like wise will tell you by what authority I do these things.
The baptism of John, whence was it? from heaven, or of men? And they reasoned with themselves, saying, If we shall say, From heaven; he will say unto us, Why did ye not then believe him?
jesusText: I also will ask you one thing, which if ye tell me, I in like wise will tell you by what authority I do these things.
The baptism of John, whence was it? from heaven, or of men?

label: Matt 21:27
verseText: And they answered Jesus, and said, We cannot tell. And he said unto them, Neither tell I you by what authority I do these things.
jesusText: Neither tell I you by what authority I do these things.

label: Matt 22:42–45
verseText: Saying, What think ye of Christ? whose son is he? They say unto him, The Son of David.
He saith unto them, How then doth David in spirit call him Lord, saying,
The LORD said unto my Lord, Sit thou on my right hand, till I make thine enemies thy footstool?
If David then call him Lord, how is he his son?
jesusText: What think ye of Christ? whose son is he?
How then doth David in spirit call him Lord, saying,
The LORD said unto my Lord, Sit thou on my right hand, till I make thine enemies thy footstool?
If David then call him Lord, how is he his son?

label: Matt 24:2
verseText: And Jesus said unto them, See ye not all these things? verily I say unto you, There shall not be left here one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
jesusText: See ye not all these things? verily I say unto you, There shall not be left here one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.

label: Matt 26:2
verseText: Ye know that after two days is the feast of the passover, and the Son of man is betrayed to be crucified.
jesusText: Ye know that after two days is the feast of the passover, and the Son of man is betrayed to be crucified.

label: Matt 26:10–13
verseText: When Jesus understood it, he said unto them, Why trouble ye the woman? for she hath wrought a good work upon me.
For ye have the poor always with you; but me ye have not always.
For in that she hath poured this ointment on my body, she did it for my burial.
Verily I say unto you, Wheresoever this gospel shall be preached in the whole world, there shall also this, that this woman hath done, be told for a memorial of her.
jesusText: Why trouble ye the woman? for she hath wrought a good work upon me.
For ye have the poor always with you; but me ye have not always.
For in that she hath poured this ointment on my body, she did it for my burial.
Verily I say unto you, Wheresoever this gospel shall be preached in the whole world, there shall also this, that this woman hath done, be told for a memorial of her.

label: Matt 26:18
verseText: And he said, Go into the city to such a man, and say unto him, The Master saith, My time is at hand; I will keep the passover at thy house with my disciples.
jesusText: Go into the city to such a man, and say unto him, The Master saith, My time is at hand; I will keep the passover at thy house with my disciples.

label: Matt 26:21
verseText: And as they did eat, he said, Verily I say unto you, that one of you shall betray me.
jesusText: Verily I say unto you, that one of you shall betray me.

label: Matt 26:23–25
verseText: And he answered and said, He that dippeth his hand with me in the dish, the same shall betray me.
The Son of man goeth as it is written of him: but woe unto that man by whom the Son of man is betrayed! it had been good for that man if he had not been born.
Then Judas, which betrayed him, answered and said, Master, is it I? He said unto him, Thou hast said.
jesusText: He that dippeth his hand with me in the dish, the same shall betray me.
The Son of man goeth as it is written of him: but woe unto that man by whom the Son of man is betrayed! it had been good for that man if he had not been born.
Thou hast said.

label: Matt 26:31–32
verseText: Then saith Jesus unto them, All ye shall be offended because of me this night: for it is written, I will smite the shepherd, and the sheep of the flock shall be scattered abroad.
But after I am risen again, I will go before you into Galilee.
jesusText: All ye shall be offended because of me this night: for it is written, I will smite the shepherd, and the sheep of the flock shall be scattered abroad.
But after I am risen again, I will go before you into Galilee.

label: Matt 26:34
verseText: Jesus said unto him, Verily I say unto thee, That this night, before the cock crow, thou shalt deny me thrice.
jesusText: Verily I say unto thee, That this night, before the cock crow, thou shalt deny me thrice.

label: Matt 26:50
verseText: And Jesus said unto him, Friend, wherefore art thou come? Then came they, and laid hands on Jesus, and took him.
jesusText: Friend, wherefore art thou come?

label: Matt 26:52–56
verseText: Then said Jesus unto him, Put up again thy sword into his place: for all they that take the sword shall perish with the sword.
Thinkest thou that I cannot now pray to my Father, and he shall presently give me more than twelve legions of angels?
But how then shall the scriptures be fulfilled, that thus it must be?
In that same hour said Jesus to the multitudes, Are ye come out as against a thief with swords and staves for to take me? I sat daily with you teaching in the temple, and ye laid no hold on me.
But all this was done, that the scriptures of the prophets might be fulfilled. Then all the disciples forsook him, and fled.
jesusText: Put up again thy sword into his place: for all they that take the sword shall perish with the sword.
Thinkest thou that I cannot now pray to my Father, and he shall presently give me more than twelve legions of angels?
But how then shall the scriptures be fulfilled, that thus it must be?
Are ye come out as against a thief with swords and staves for to take me? I sat daily with you teaching in the temple, and ye laid no hold on me.
But all this was done, that the scriptures of the prophets might be fulfilled.

label: Matt 27:11
verseText: And Jesus stood before the governor: and the governor asked him, saying, Art thou the King of the Jews? And Jesus said unto him, Thou sayest.
jesusText: Thou sayest.
